title: How to turn any MP4 video into a GIF (free, in your browser)

segments.voice: Got a short video clip you want to share as a GIF?

scene.headline: Want it as a GIF?
scene.sub: a short loop, no audio, plays everywhere

segments.voice: Slack threads, Discord servers, Reddit replies, project READMEs.

scene.headline:
Slack, Discord,
Reddit, README
scene.sub: places where MP4s don't autoplay or aren't allowed

segments.voice: Most converters online make you upload your file. Yours stays private here.

scene.headline:
Your file
stays on your device
scene.sub: nothing is uploaded to a server

segments.voice: Free. No signup. Nothing to install.
Go to twineconvert dot com slash mp4 to gif.
Drop the video. Click convert. Download your GIF. Done.
Link's in the bio, give it a try!
